headline: Jim Cramer Discusses the Possibility of “End of Adobe’s Design Dominance”
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is among the stocks in focus as Jim Cramer reviewed the S&P 500’s top performers and the Nasdaq 100’s biggest laggards for the first quarter.
